summary_rows.direct_gf_comment: Direct transmon g-f carrier excitation does not remove a storage photon.
summary_rows.fallback_step_a_observable: fixed Step B dump witness: P(|g,1_r,n_s-1>) or integrated readout ringdown
summary_rows.recommended_step_a_observable: P_f immediately after the storage-sideband probe
summary_rows.recommended_step_b_observable: readout occupation or integrated homodyne ringdown
